commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=763422723084c2bf6ef71f44e0110c3d0a02f227)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a built-in tart SSH-lease provider with config/env/CLI flags, provider registration, lifecycle/list/release/cleanup/doctor code, and Go tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: provider=tart advertises FeatureDesktop, core accepts --desktop for providers with that feature, and the VNC path waits for 127.0.0.1:5900 while the tart backend never enables Screen Sharing/VNC. I did not run this on Apple Silicon.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide core ownership and require a desktop capability correction, docs, and real Crabbox provider proof before merge.

target.title: feat: add tart provider for macOS VMs on Apple Silicon
target.body:
## Summary

Add a `tart` provider for running macOS VMs on Apple Silicon via [Cirrus Labs tart](https://github.com/cirruslabs/tart). This enables local macOS staging environments using Apple's native Virtualization.framework -- no Parallels license needed.

## How it works

- **Acquire**: `tart clone` from OCI base image, `tart set` CPU/memory/disk, `tart run --no-graphics`, poll `tart ip`, inject SSH key via `tart exec`, wait for SSH readiness
- **Resolve**: find running VM by `crabbox-` name prefix
- **List**: `tart list --format json` filtered by prefix
- **Release**: `tart stop` + `tart delete`
- **Cleanup**: garbage collect stale VMs past idle timeout
- **Doctor**: verify tart CLI and list capability
- **SSH key injection**: via `tart exec` (no sshpass, no credentials on argv)
- **Ready check**: macOS-safe `uname -s && test -d ~` (no crabbox-ready script needed)

## Proof

Full lifecycle proven on M4 Pro Mac (macOS 26.4.1) over Tailscale SSH, tart 2.32.1:

```
=== FRESH PROOF ===
OS     CPU Memory Disk DiskFormat Size   Display  State
darwin 4   8192   50   raw        36.222 1024x768 stopped
192.168.64.2
Darwin admins-Virtual-Machine.local 22.6.0 ARM64_VMAPPLE arm64
ProductName:  macOS
ProductVersion: 13.7.4
BuildVersion: 22H420
STOP_OK
DELETE_OK
=== DONE ===
```

## Configuration

CLI flags: `--tart-image`, `--tart-cpu`, `--tart-memory`, `--tart-disk`

YAML (`.crabbox.yaml`):
```yaml
tart:
  image: ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-ventura-base:latest
  user: admin
  cpus: 4
  memory: 8192
  disk: 50
```

Env vars: `CRABBOX_TART_IMAGE`, `CRABBOX_TART_USER`, `CRABBOX_TART_WORK_ROOT`, `CRABBOX_TART_CPUS`, `CRABBOX_TART_MEMORY`, `CRABBOX_TART_DISK`

## Not included (follow-up)

- Shared-directory mounts (`tart run --dir`) -- needs explicit host-mount config, deferred
- Checkpoint/fork support -- tracked in separate PR

## Files changed

- `internal/providers/tart/provider.go` -- provider registration, spec, capability
- `internal/providers/tart/backend.go` -- full SSHLeaseBackend lifecycle
- `internal/providers/tart/core.go` -- type aliases bridging core exports
- `internal/providers/tart/flags.go` -- CLI flag registration
- `internal/providers/tart/provider_test.go` -- 12 unit tests
- `internal/cli/config.go` -- TartConfig struct, file config, env var loading
- `internal/cli/providers_builtin_test.go` -- test provider registration
- `internal/providers/all/all.go` -- import registration

## Test plan

- [x] 12 provider unit tests pass
- [x] `go build` / `go vet` / `go test` pass (Go 1.26.4 darwin/arm64)
- [x] Real lifecycle proof on M4 Pro Mac: clone + set + run + ip + exec + stop + delete
- [x] SSH key injection via tart exec (no sshpass)
- [x] Resource flags applied before boot (tart set --cpu/--memory/--disk-size)
- [x] YAML + env var config wired
